summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No merge is recommended because none has a complete merge preflight with current Codex /review proof and addressed review-bot findings; #67432 also has failing checks and needs repair before it can be reconsidered.

actions.reason: Broad config/session/auth-provider behavior plus unresolved review-bot/comment proof requires maintainer judgment before merge or repair.
The PR may be viable, but merge proof is incomplete under the merge policy.
Narrow PR with passing checks, but required merge proof is missing.
The change is narrow, but failing checks block merge. Repair should happen on the contributor branch before any merge recommendation.
The PR may be viable, but iOS/watch target migration is compatibility-sensitive and lacks the required review preflight proof.
Create an executable repair artifact for the only PR in the shard with concrete failing checks and a narrow repair surface.

needs_human: #51762: maintainer judgment required for broad config/session/auth-provider behavior and unresolved review proof.
#66478: merge proof incomplete because review-bot findings/Codex review status are not proven resolved.
#66685: merge proof incomplete because current Codex /review proof is missing.
#92477: maintainer judgment required for compatibility-sensitive iOS/watch migration without current review preflight proof.

repair_candidate.summary: Repair #67432 on the contributor branch before reconsidering merge. The PR is a one-line accessibility change, but current live checks include failing Real behavior proof and failing core/runtime-infra jobs.
repair_candidate.pr_title: fix(ui): add aria-label to pinned message Unpin button
repair_candidate.pr_body: Repair path for #67432: keep the contributor branch as the source of truth, rebase narrowly onto current main if needed, preserve @akinshaywai attribution, address any hydrated Greptile/Codex review-bot findings, run Codex /review, and rerun the failed proof/core checks before merge consideration.
validation_commands: targeted UI accessibility test or proof for pinned message Unpin button announcing "Unpin"
rerun failed Real behavior proof for #67432
rerun or repair failing checks-node-core and checks-node-core-runtime-infra jobs
credit_notes: Credit contributor @akinshaywai if the branch is repaired or if a replacement PR is later required.
